_README: Deterministic analysis-object fixture for the Morrison V&V40 case (cou1-flavored). Hand-built to match the shape pipeline.finalize produces, so reviewer/author renders are tested without a live LLM run.

assessed: Relevance of the quantities of interest
missing: Relevance of the validation activities to the COU

weakeners.description: Validation activity has limited relevance to the stated context of use.
factors: Relevance of the validation activities to the COU

weakeners.description: Test conditions only partially cover the operating range relied on.

headline: 2 weakeners fired (1 High, 1 Medium); 2 factors not assessed; 11 of 13 credibility factors assessed.

context.cou_description: A centrifugal blood pump used for short-duration cardiopulmonary bypass support. The computational model predicts hemolysis to support a substantial-equivalence safety argument.

authenticity.statement: This evidence was assessed in an unsigned demo, so identity and tamper-evidence were not verified. A formally issued assurance package would carry a content hash and a cryptographic signature, shown here for a reviewer (or a technical colleague) to re-verify.
